transcript.text:
[Baby Tzuyang waiting for food]
[Mommy's here]
[Eat a lot and grow big]
[Not enough, right?]
[It's all for you]
[But mom...]
[This is a little too much...]
[Nope]
[Just keep eating]
[Eat everything]
[Eat if you dare]
[Will she be able to finish this mukbang?]
[A rainy day in Hyehwa-dong]
Hello everyone
I'm here in Hyehwa-dong today
I ate about 170,000 Won by myself (~$130 USD)

I wonder how much it will be today
[HaiDiLao]
Smells delicious
This room is great
[It has everything you need]
[Pot with 4 broths]
Mushroom, Ma-La Spicy, Tomato,
Our Pork Bone Broth is very popular
[Let's get that then]
[Picking the spiciness]
[All done with broth]
This place always has the best service
You can pick the toppings here
What is this? Noodles? I didn't see this last time
Catfish,
1 of every meat

Assorted seafood,
Dumplings, scallops,
Shrimp & squid ball,
Shrimp ball, assorted fishcake, chicken gizzard
I saw pig's brain on the menu last time
I don't think I'll ever be able to eat that
Beef small intestines, sweet potato glass noodles, fried tofu,
Bean sprouts, sweet pumpkin, potatoes, corn,
Mushrooms, lettuce
That's already 250,000 Won (~$190 USD)
[That's a lot of food]
[Order]
[While we wait...]
[There's a sauce bar]
Thank you
-Can you eat everything? -Yes

Tomato, pork bone, mushroom, and ma-la
These 3 are a must
Let's mix up the sauce
I did a good job
[All the food in line]
[This is all for 1 person]
[Knock knock]
Wait...
Is this everything?
1 more
[Last one]
Thank you
I'm so happy
[Packed]
I wanted to eat like this last time too
But I couldn't because I was by myself

I'm good at eating alone
Fishballs in first
And
There's more? Hold up...
Thank you
There's no more space
This is happiness So crazy
This meat looks very expensive
The marblings are no joke Let's try this
In the mushroom broth My favorite
[Just 10 seconds]
A little bit of soy sauce first
Spicy ma-la
Real quick
Peanut sauce
It's so good

Wow
Tomato sauce
It's so good What do I do?
1 each
Let's put them in before they melt Since there's a lot
I love how quickly beef gets cooked
Dip a little
Insane...
The flavors change depending on the broth
Beef belly
I saw this on YouTube
Get it like this
Like this
It worked That's cool
And dip it like this
In spicy ma-la

[Sweet pumpkins too]
Oh right, the fishballs
Looks so good
I love the texture
It's great
Peanut sauce goes well with spicy ma-la
So good
Let's eat
Let's cook the small intestines real quick
Squeeze this out
[Shrimp fishballs]
Here it is
It's filled Let's cool it down
Fried tofu
Some corn in here too They're tasty
This is the fishball Let's cut it in half

What's this?
Wow
Not sure what it is, but it's good
Is this cheese?
It's so good
I just want to eat this
Stop over-reacting
I need to calm down But I've been wanting to eat hot pot
What is this?
So soft
Let's eat some meat now
I have 5 plates here
The marbling is great
Tomato broth now
The meat goes well with spicy ma-la
Is this the fried tofu?

This is it?
What the...
That tasted really good
Let's scoop everything out
And start fresh
[Got the broths refilled]
Cooked really well
This is the shrimp ball that I squeezed in
Dip in soy sauce
[Gigantic]
Tasty
My shirt...
[RIP shirt]
[Whatever]
Some toppings are hard to scoop out so this will help with that
Some corn? This should be ready

This is like some coconut milk
This will cool down the numbness when you eat spicy ma-la
Corn is very delicious
It's good dipped in sauce like this too
Which meat was this again?
[Using the ladle]
This is a good idea
I've been forgetting about the seafood
I'm forgetting what's here because I ordered so many
Greenshell mussels, abalone, scallop, shrimp
[All in]
Scallop Gotta cook this, right?
In the tomato broth
That's so yummy
It goes well with the tomato broth
[Webfoot octopus]

It will be a lot spicier with the oil floating on top here
The peanut sauce will neutralize it
[Making some space]
I think it's ready
Not hot Let's get it out
So good
Get it like this
I need to get the seafood out
Shrimp here, shrimp, Shrimp
[Rescuing all the seafood out of the broths]
All done
Abalone
Greenshell mussels,
Peel the shrimp at once
Get the head out
Bite it

Eat
[Finishing up the glass noodles]
I didn't eat the catfish yet
It's hard to eat it because of the dirt smell
But the texture is so great
That's why it's gotta go in the ma-la broth
Squid & shrimp balls
This is tasty too Scoop it out
[More sauce]
Cook it in the ma-la sauce
[Water bomb]
[She has no idea...]
You go in here
I thought this mukbang would be quick because it cooks fast
But it's already been 2 hours with this much food left
What's this?

[Beef rib meat]
[Let's give it a spin]
This won't cook the inside
Let's just put it in
The texture is great I'm not sure about the taste though
-Are you enjoying the food? -Yes!
Here's the check
[It's this long]
279,100 Won (~$213 USD)
That's incredible
[Endless print of receipt]
So much better
The spicy ma-la broth of the chili oil will get rid of the dirt taste from the catfish
Wait a minute
It got cooked as a roll
See? It doesn't cook the inside

Goes really well with the mushroom broth
Let's dip it
I'm afraid of this too
I didn't think the chicken gizzard would come out seasoned
I don't think I can put it in the broth
Yummy
Beef tongue
All the way because I'm scared
Will it be good?
Potatoes are tasty here too
They cook pretty fast
I'm not getting full because I'm eating so slow
I really feel like I can sit and eat here for 24 hours
Right, they had their own noodles here
They will bring it when I'm almost finished
Excuse me

[Now for their noodles]
That almost touched me
[Ready in 2 minutes] Thank you
Small intestines in here This is convenient
The noodles...
What? What?
This looks like kalguksu (knife-cut noodles)
Too much
Lettuce for last
Very similar to kalguksu noodles
It's very soft and slippery
Delicious
Potatoes
Cooked so well
Noodles to finish it off
Get the small intestines out

I saved this for last so that the seasoning doesn't ruin the broth
[Knock knock]
What is this?
[Dessert]
[Fruits on the house]
The broth is amazing I want to take them home
Would be great to put rice in here later
That's good
It's seasoned very well It's delicious
I want to eat here again tomorrow
Corn With sauce
That's very deep
There's nothing left
[Finished]
[Watermelon time]
This is the best watermelon I've had this year

I was going to order more, but I've been here for almost 3 hours
I have to leave for the group that made a reservation
Sadly, I will have to end it here
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
